Reconnaissance

Start here during discovery. Pick the area you need, then jump directly into commands, payloads, and notes for that topic.

OSINT

Public Intelligence

Search engines, public repositories, emails, leaks, and exposed organization information.

Ports

Port Scanning

Map exposed TCP/UDP surfaces and move from broad discovery into targeted enumeration.

Services

Service Enumeration

Enumerate protocols, banners, shares, names, mail behavior, web routes, and useful service metadata.
